basic_details.job_title: Tripura University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura University (TU) has officially released the Project Associate-I Notification 2026 on 23-05-2026 for the recruitment of Project Associate-I post. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Associate-I position under a contractual research project. Candidates with an M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent degree in Life Sciences are eligible to apply via email. The application process is active, and the last date to submit the email application is 10-06-2026. Interested candidates can access the notification PDF and apply details below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent degree in Life Sciences
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Microbiology or equivalent degree in Life Sciences with basic knowledge of handling microorganisms.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tripura University Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tripura University Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Tripura University Project Associate-1 position is 10 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Microbiology or an equivalent degree in Life Sciences with basic knowledge of handling microorganisms.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-1 position in Tripura University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 31,000 per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Tripura University Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is BT/PR51624/NER/95/2121/2024.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Tripura University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided above.
